values.value: Detects pairs of successful logins for the same user from two countries that are physically too far apart for the elapsed time to be plausible. A confirmed match indicates either credential compromise or unsanitized VPN usage and warrants immediate session termination.

Contact the user to confirm whether both logins were them. If not, expire their password, revoke active sessions, force MFA re-enrollment, and review recent activity for unauthorized changes. If the user confirms legitimate VPN use, document the source IP range and consider a network allowlist.
